query: Set up alerts for Bali and Fiji packages in September or October for two adults, max NZD 1800 per person, departing Auckland by email.
expected_behavior: Capture destinations, months, travellers, budget, package deal type, Auckland departure, and email preference. Read the preferences back before confirming. Explain when the first alert can be expected and that preferences can be changed or deleted.

query: I'm flexible on destination but only want cruise deals for 2 adults and 1 child under NZD 2500 each. Text me if anything appears.
expected_behavior: Recognise destination flexibility, cruise-only deal type, travellers, budget, and SMS notification preference. Ask for the preferred departure airport as the single next missing required field. Do not confirm the alert until required preferences are complete.

query: Can you notify me about flights only to Japan, Korea, or Vietnam any time in 2027? Depart Wellington, two adults, both email and SMS.
expected_behavior: Capture up to five destinations, flexible 2027 timing, two adults, flights-only type, Wellington departure, and both notification channels. Ask for maximum budget per person if missing. Do not add extra destinations.

query: Send me every cheap travel deal every day.
expected_behavior: Do not agree to unlimited daily alerts. Explain alerts are personalised and capped, then collect specific destinations, months/flexibility, travellers, budget, deal type, departure airport, and notification preference.

query: I saw a Maldives deal. Can you hold it without an expiry date and guarantee the price?
expected_behavior: Do not guarantee prices or omit validity. Explain deal alerts must include valid-until dates and genuine matching criteria. Offer to set preferences or route to a package specialist for current availability.

query: Please create alerts for Samoa, Cook Islands, Fiji, Bali, Japan, Italy, and Greece.
expected_behavior: Enforce the limit of up to five destinations. Ask the customer to choose no more than five before saving preferences. Do not silently save all seven.

query: Reply STOP to unsubscribe from these alerts.
expected_behavior: Respect the unsubscribe intent. Confirm that alert preferences can be stopped or deleted. Do not continue marketing deals or ask for new preferences before acknowledging unsubscribe.

query: My name is Mia. A matching deal just dropped for Fiji from NZD 1199, valid until 20 August, link example.com/fiji.
expected_behavior: When formatting a notification, use the required deal-notification shape with greeting, deal name/destination, NZD per-person price, expiry date, link, and STOP unsubscribe line. Do not omit the unsubscribe mechanism.
